images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with the aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, captured in an avant-garde artistic black and white portrait. She is standing on a city crosswalk streetshot, viewed through the window glass which adds a layer of voyeuristic texture. She wears a tight, form-fitting sports bra and high-waisted yoga pants that accentuate her slim waist and curvy, fit physique, highlighting the fabric's smooth texture against her flawless skin. In her hand, she holds a sparkler that emits a trailing light, contrasting with the dark moody green color grade and blue hour moody light that bathes the scene without heavy shadows. Her expression is one of whispering a secret, lips parted slightly, large expressive eyes gazing intensely at the lens. The background is a blurred, aesthetic city street with bokeh effects. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
